roles.name: Grandmother
roles.summary: You start knowing a good player & their character. If the Demon kills them, you die too.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知一名善良玩家及其角色。若恶魔杀死该玩家，你也会死亡。
roles.detail: First night only. Learn one good player and their character. If that player later dies by the Demon, you also die.
roles.chineseDetail: 仅首夜行动。说书人指出一名善良玩家与其角色；若其后来被恶魔杀死，祖母也会随之死亡。

roles.name: Sailor
roles.summary: Each night, choose an alive player: either you or they are drunk until dusk. You can't die.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名存活玩家，你或他其中一人醉酒直到黄昏；你不会死亡。
roles.detail: Wake each night and pick a living player. One of you is drunk until dusk, but the Sailor is safe from death while sober rules are resolved by the Storyteller.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚选择一名存活玩家。你们其中一人醉酒直到黄昏；具体由说书人裁定，同时水手受到死亡保护。

roles.name: Chambermaid
roles.summary: Each night, choose 2 alive players. You learn how many woke tonight due to their ability.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择两名存活玩家，得知今晚因自身能力醒来的有几人。
roles.detail: Wake each night and choose two living players. Learn 0, 1, or 2 depending on how many woke because of their own ability.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚选择两名存活玩家，获得 0/1/2，表示他们当夜是否因自己能力醒来。

roles.name: Exorcist
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player. If they are the Demon, they don't wake tonight.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家。若其是恶魔，则今夜恶魔不行动。
roles.detail: Choose a player at night except the first. If that player is the Demon, their action is blocked for the night.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚选择一名玩家；若其为恶魔，则恶魔今夜不会醒来使用能力。

roles.name: Innkeeper
roles.summary: Each night*, choose 2 players: they can't die tonight, but one is drunk until dusk.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择两名玩家，他们今夜不会死亡，但其中一人醉酒直到黄昏。
roles.detail: Choose two players at night except the first. Both are protected from death tonight, but one is drunk until dusk.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚选择两名玩家保护免死，但其中一人会醉酒直到黄昏。

roles.name: Gambler
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player & guess their character. If wrong, you die.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家并猜其角色；若猜错，你死亡。
roles.detail: At night except the first, choose a player and declare a character. If the guess is wrong, the Gambler dies.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚选择一名玩家并声明一个角色；若不正确，赌徒死亡。

roles.name: Gossip
roles.summary: Each day, you may make a public statement. Tonight, if true, a player dies.
roles.chineseSummary: 每天：你可以公开说一句话。若为真，今夜会有一名玩家死亡。
roles.detail: Day ability. If the Gossip makes a true statement, one player dies that night, chosen by the Storyteller.
roles.chineseDetail: 白天发动。若公开陈述为真，夜里会额外死一人，由说书人结算。

roles.name: Courtier
roles.summary: Once per game, at night, choose a character: they are drunk for 3 days & nights.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里：选择一个角色，该角色醉酒 3 天 3 夜。
roles.detail: One-shot night ability. Name a character; all players of that character are drunk for three full days and nights.
roles.chineseDetail: 夜里一次性指定一个角色，所有该角色玩家连续 3 天 3 夜醉酒。

roles.name: Professor
roles.summary: Once per game, at night, choose a dead player: if they are a Townsfolk, they are resurrected.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里：选择一名死者。若其是镇民，则复活。
roles.detail: One-shot night ability. Pick a dead player. If they are a Townsfolk, they return to life.
roles.chineseDetail: 夜里一次性指定一名死者；若其是真镇民，则恢复存活。

roles.name: Minstrel
roles.summary: When a Minion dies by execution, all good players are drunk until dusk tomorrow.
roles.chineseSummary: 若爪牙被处决而死，所有善良玩家醉酒直到明天黄昏。
roles.detail: Passive ability. If a Minion is executed, all good players are drunk until the next dusk.
roles.chineseDetail: 这是被动能力，不需夜晚操作；若爪牙白天被处决死亡，所有善良玩家醉酒到次日黄昏。

roles.name: Tea Lady
roles.summary: If both your alive neighbors are good, they can't die.
roles.chineseSummary: 若你两侧的存活邻座都是善良，他们不会死亡。
roles.detail: Passive protection. While both living neighbors are good, they are safe from death.
roles.chineseDetail: 只要两侧存活邻座均为善良，他们不会因死亡效果而死。

roles.name: Pacifist
roles.summary: Executed good players might not die.
roles.chineseSummary: 被处决的善良玩家可能不会死亡。
roles.detail: Passive ability. The Storyteller may spare an executed good player from death.
roles.chineseDetail: 被动能力。说书人可以让被处决的善良玩家存活。

roles.name: Fool
roles.summary: The first time you die, you don't.
roles.chineseSummary: 第一次本应死亡时，你不会死。
roles.detail: Passive ability. The Fool survives the first death that would kill them.
roles.chineseDetail: 愚者第一次遭遇死亡时会存活；之后再无额外保护。

roles.name: Tinker
roles.summary: You might die at any time.
roles.chineseSummary: 你可能在任何时刻死亡。
roles.detail: Passive drawback. The Storyteller may kill the Tinker at any time.
roles.chineseDetail: 修补匠可被说书人在任何时刻判死，用于信息与平衡调整。

roles.name: Moonchild
roles.summary: When you learn that you died by execution, choose a player tonight: they die unless good.
roles.chineseSummary: 当你得知自己被处决而死后，今夜选择一名玩家；除非其为邪恶，否则其死亡。
roles.detail: After being executed, the Moonchild chooses a player that night. If that player is evil they live; otherwise they die, per normal Storyteller resolution.
roles.chineseDetail: 被处决死亡后，当夜选择一名玩家；除非其为邪恶，否则该玩家死亡。

roles.name: Goon
roles.summary: Each night, the first player to choose you with their ability makes you their alignment & you are drunk until dusk.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚第一个以能力指定你的人，会让你变成其阵营，且你醉酒直到黄昏。
roles.detail: Passive reactive role. The first ability to target the Goon each night changes the Goon's alignment and makes them drunk until dusk.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚第一个用能力指向你的人会让你改为其阵营，并让你醉酒直到黄昏。

roles.name: Lunatic
roles.summary: You think you are a Demon, but you are not.
roles.chineseSummary: 你以为自己是恶魔，但其实不是。
roles.detail: The Lunatic may receive Demon-style information and make fake Demon choices, but is actually good.
roles.chineseDetail: 说书人可给予恶魔式假信息与假选择；疯子并不是真恶魔。

roles.name: Godfather
roles.summary: You start knowing which Outsiders are in play. If 1 died today, choose a player tonight: they die. [-1 or +1 Outsider]
roles.chineseSummary: 你开局得知哪些外来者在场。若今天有外来者死亡，今夜选择一名玩家死亡。[-1 或 +1 外来者]
roles.detail: First night: learn which Outsiders are in play. On nights after an Outsider died by day, choose a player to die. Setup changes Outsider count by minus or plus one.
roles.chineseDetail: 开局得知场上外来者，且建立牌堆时要将外来者数调整为少 1 或多 1。若今天死了外来者，今夜教父额外杀一人。

roles.name: Devil's Advocate
roles.summary: Each night, choose a living player. If executed tomorrow, they don't die.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名存活玩家。若其明天被处决，则不会死亡。
roles.detail: Choose a living player each night. If that player is executed the next day, they survive instead.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚选择一名存活玩家；若其第二天被处决，则本次处决不致死。

roles.name: Assassin
roles.summary: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: they die, even if for some reason they could not.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家，其死亡，即使本应不会死。
roles.detail: One-shot night kill except the first night. The chosen player dies even through many protections.
roles.chineseDetail: 一次性夜间杀人，通常能穿透大多数“不会死亡”的保护。

roles.name: Mastermind
roles.summary: If the Demon dies by execution, play for 1 more day. If good doesn't win that day, evil wins.
roles.chineseSummary: 若恶魔被处决而死，游戏多进行 1 天；若善良那天没赢，邪恶获胜。
roles.detail: Passive endgame extender. If the Demon is executed, the game continues for one final day.
roles.chineseDetail: 若恶魔因白天处决而死，游戏继续到下一天结束；那天若善良未满足胜利条件，则邪恶反胜。

roles.name: Zombuul
roles.summary: Each night*, if no one died today, choose a player: they die. The 1st time you die, you live but appear dead.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：若今天无人死亡，则选择一名玩家死亡。你第一次死亡时会活着但看似已死。
roles.detail: Night kill on nights after a no-death day. The first time the Zombuul dies, it stays alive but registers as dead.
roles.chineseDetail: 只有在白天无人死亡时，首夜后才会在夜里杀人。其第一次死亡会伪装成死亡但仍存活。

roles.name: Pukka
roles.summary: Each night, choose a player: they are poisoned. The previously poisoned player dies then becomes healthy.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家，其被投毒；前一晚被毒者死亡并恢复正常。
roles.detail: On the first night, poison a player. On later nights, the previously poisoned player dies, then the new target is poisoned.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜开始投毒一人。之后每晚，前一晚中毒者死亡并恢复，新目标中毒。

roles.name: Shabaloth
roles.summary: Each night*, choose 2 players: they die. A dead player you chose last night might be regurgitated.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择两名玩家死亡。你上晚杀死的一名玩家可能被反刍复活。
roles.detail: Choose two players to die on nights except the first. A previously killed player may return to life at the Storyteller's discretion.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚选择两名玩家死亡；说书人可让你先前杀死的一名玩家复活。

roles.name: Po
roles.summary: Each night*, you may choose a player: they die. If you choose no one, next night choose 3 players.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：你可以选择一名玩家死亡；若今夜不杀人，下晚可杀 3 人。
roles.detail: The Po can skip a kill to charge, then later choose three players to die.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚可杀一人；若你选择今夜不杀，下晚可一次杀三人。
